title: stachys aspera var. japonica
intro: Stachys aspera var. japonica, also known as Japanese wrinkled betony, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to East Asia. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Stachys aspera var. japonica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
